channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ubisoft Co-Founder Claude Guillemot Dies in Plane Crash
item.description: Claude Guillemot and a flight instructor were flying a twin-engine Cessna 421 on Friday evening. An investigation into the crash is ongoing.

item.title: Russia releases 24 Filipinos after Philippine President Marcos speaks with Putin
item.description: Philippine officials noted reports that the individuals may have been victims of illegal job recruitment.

item.title: Extreme heat warning issued at Grand Canyon following three hiker deaths
item.description: Grand Canyon National Park warns visitors of extreme heat expected early next week.

item.title: Iran live updates: Iran declares strait closed after deadly attacks on Lebanon
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, involving joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
